allow: PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ghosh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\NDJSONs\\anniemal.ndjson" | ForEach-Object { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json } | ForEach-Object { $proj = $_.projects.PSObject.Properties.Value | Select-Object -First 1; $labels = $proj.labels; foreach \($l in $labels\) { $l.label_details } } | Where-Object { $_.reviews -ne "" } | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ghosh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\NDJSONs\\anniemal.ndjson" | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $row = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; $proj = $row.projects.PSObject.Properties.Value | Select-Object -First 1; $l = $proj.labels | Select-Object -First 1; [PSCustomObject]@{ created_by = $l.label_details.created_by; reviews = \($l.label_details.reviews | ConvertTo-Json\) } } | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ghosh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\NDJSONs\\Export  project - 172_hours_atc_canada_20260504T175159Z - 5_15_2026.ndjson" | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { $row = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; $proj = $row.projects.PSObject.Properties.Value | Select-Object -First 1; $l = $proj.labels | Select-Object -First 1; [PSCustomObject]@{ created_by = $l.label_details.created_by; reviews = $l.label_details.reviews } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ghosh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\NDJSONs\\Export  project - 172_hours_atc_canada_20260504T175159Z - 5_15_2026.ndjson" | ForEach-Object { $row = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; $proj = $row.projects.PSObject.Properties.Value | Select-Object -First 1; $l = $proj.labels | Select-Object -First 1; if \($l.label_details.reviews.Count -gt 0\) { $l.label_details.reviews | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; break } })

PowerShell($found = $false; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ghosh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\NDJSONs\\Export  project - 202_hours_atc_AU_CH_IE_NL_20260427T204919Z - 5_15_2026 \(1\).ndjson" | ForEach-Object { if \($found\) { return }; $row = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; $proj = $row.projects.PSObject.Properties.Value | Select-Object -First 1; $l = $proj.labels | Select-Object -First 1; if \($l -and $l.label_details.reviews.Count -gt 0\) { $l.label_details.reviews | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; $found = $true } })
